notionUnauthorized.title: Your Notion connection expired
notionUnauthorized.detail: Sign in to Notion again to keep converting your pages.

network.title: Couldn't reach 2anki.
network.detail: Check your connection and try again.

serviceUnavailable.title: The service is unreachable right now.
serviceUnavailable.detail: This is usually temporary — try again in a moment.

apkgGone.title: This deck is no longer available.
apkgGone.detail: Uploaded decks are removed after a while. Convert or upload it again to preview it.

notionPageNotFound.title: We couldn't open that Notion page.
notionPageNotFound.detail: It may have been deleted, or it's no longer shared with 2anki. Share it again in Notion, or pick a different page.

monthlyLimit.title: You've reached your monthly limit.
monthlyLimit.detail: Upgrade your plan to convert more decks this month.

fallback.title: Something went wrong.
fallback.detail: Try again. If the problem keeps happening, email support@2anki.net.

uploadFallback.title: Something broke while reading this file.
uploadFallback.detail: Try again, or send the file to support@2anki.net so we can fix the parser.

too_large.title: This export is too large to convert in one go.
too_large.detail: Split it into smaller Notion subpages and convert each one separately.

password_protected_pdf.title: This PDF is password-protected.
password_protected_pdf.detail: Remove the password in your PDF reader, save a copy, and upload that.

invalid_markup.title: Part of this file has formatting we couldn't read.
invalid_markup.detail: Open the source, remove or simplify the block that broke, and try again.

malformed_notion.title: This Notion export couldn't be parsed.
malformed_notion.detail: Re-export the page from Notion and try again.

corrupted_apkg.title: This .apkg file is damaged.
corrupted_apkg.detail: Re-export it from Anki, or send it to support@2anki.net.

empty_export.title: This export has no content we can turn into cards.
empty_export.detail: Check the page has text or toggle blocks, then export again.

markdown_likely_lossy.title: Notion Markdown exports flatten toggles — re-export this page as HTML and the toggles become flashcards.

claude_parse_failed.title: Something went wrong while making your cards.
claude_parse_failed.detail: Try again — if it keeps happening, email support@2anki.net.

parser_crash.title: Couldn't read this file.
parser_crash.detail: It may be malformed or use a structure we don't recognise yet. Try re-exporting from the source app, or send the file to support@2anki.net.

worker_timeout.title: This conversion took longer than the time budget.
worker_timeout.detail: Try splitting the file into smaller pieces, or remove very large embedded images.

notion_rate_limit.title: Notion is rate-limiting us right now.
notion_rate_limit.detail: Wait a minute and convert again.

notion_object_not_found.title: We couldn't open that Notion page.
notion_object_not_found.detail: Share it with the 2anki integration in Notion, then try again.

apkg_too_large_for_anki.title: This deck is over Anki's upload limit.
apkg_too_large_for_anki.detail: Split it by toggling fewer pages, or upload directly to Anki desktop.

zip_invalid.title: Couldn't read this zip.
zip_invalid.detail: Make sure it's the Markdown & CSV export from Notion, not the HTML export.

rootBoundary.chunkTitle: This page was updated while you had it open
rootBoundary.chunkSubtitle: Reload to load the latest version. If reload doesn't help, reset local data and reload.
rootBoundary.resetFailed: Couldn't reset local data. Clear site data for 2anki in your browser settings, then reload.
rootBoundary.genericSubtitle: Try reloading. If that doesn't help, reset local data and reload.

domRecovery.title: Something went wrong
domRecovery.subtitle: A browser extension may be interfering with this page. Reload to start over.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist or may have moved.
